suggested_response: Thank you for your wonderful review! We're thrilled that our economy class seats exceeded your expectations. Your kind words will be shared with our cabin crew leadership team. We're also glad to hear that our breakfast service and inflight entertainment options met your needs. We'd love to have you fly with us again soon!
strategic_steps: Notify Cabin Crew Leadership team about excellent staff service
Share positive review with In-flight Catering team
Forward feedback on seat comfort and breakfast quality
